creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Fixes build with FFmpeg 6.0
- Various bugfixes

Compile tested on FreeBSD 13.2-BETA1 (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 12.3-RELEASE (amd64)

Compile tested with follow ports using Poudriere:
deskutils/spacefm
graphics/geeqie
x11-fm/caja

Yuri and Dmitry,
I'd appreciate if you could do a small runtime test using the ports you maintain
